---
title: "Marketplace Listing Strategy"
description: "A listing strategy project for improving vehicle photos, pricing, buyer trust, and lead quality."
date: 2026-03-28
categories: [Marketplace, Listings, Lead Quality]
image: ../assets/argtech-marketplace-listings.png
---

## Business Question

Which vehicle listing improvements should Arg Tech prioritize to improve buyer trust and local lead quality?

## Approach

The project groups keywords by customer journey stage, compares current page coverage against competitor coverage, and scores topics using search intent, ranking difficulty, estimated traffic, and commercial relevance.

| Topic Cluster | Intent | Current Coverage | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
| Product comparison | Consideration | Weak | High |
| Beginner guide | Awareness | Moderate | Medium |
| Pricing questions | Decision | Weak | High |
| Use-case examples | Consideration | Missing | High |

## Insight

The strongest opportunity sits in consideration-stage content. Visitors are not only learning the category; they are comparing options and looking for practical examples. Pages that answer comparison and pricing questions can support both SEO traffic and sales readiness.

## Recommendation

Create a three-page content series: comparison guide, pricing FAQ, and use-case article. Each page should include internal links to related resources and a clear conversion path to a demo, consultation, or email signup.

## Employer-Relevant Skills

- Keyword grouping
- Search intent analysis
- Content prioritization
- SEO recommendations tied to business goals
